query:
-- Advertising campaigns
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `advertising_campaigns` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `platform` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('draft','active','paused','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `budget` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `spent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `impressions` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `clicks` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `conversions` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `startDate` timestamp,
  `endDate` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `advertising_campaigns_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

-- Affiliate partners
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `affiliate_partners` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(320) NOT NULL,
  `website` varchar(512),
  `category` varchar(128),
  `status` enum('pending','active','rejected','inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `commissionRate` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
  `referralCode` varchar(32),
  `totalReferrals` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalEarningsCents` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `affiliate_partners_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `affiliate_partners_email_unique` UNIQUE(`email`)
);

-- Affiliate discoveries (prospecting)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `affiliate_discoveries` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `url` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(256),
  `email` varchar(320),
  `category` varchar(128),
  `score` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `status` enum('discovered','contacted','applied','rejected','active') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'discovered',
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `affiliate_discoveries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

-- Affiliate applications
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `affiliate_applications` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `discoveryId` int,
  `partnerId` int,
  `platform` varchar(128),
  `applicationUrl` varchar(512),
  `status` enum('pending','submitted','approved','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `submittedAt` timestamp,
  `approvedAt` timestamp,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `affiliate_applications_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

-- Marketing budgets
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `marketing_budgets` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `month` varchar(7) NOT NULL,
  `totalBudgetCents` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `spentCents` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `channelBreakdown` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `marketing_budgets_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `marketing_budgets_month_unique` UNIQUE(`month`)
);

-- SEO pages config
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `seo_pages` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `path` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `keywords` json,
  `lastAuditAt` timestamp,
  `score` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `issues` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `seo_pages_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `seo_pages_path_unique` UNIQUE(`path`)
);

-- Blog posts
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `blog_posts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `slug` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `excerpt` text,
  `content` longtext,
  `category` varchar(128),
  `tags` json,
  `status` enum('draft','published','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `publishedAt` timestamp,
  `seoScore` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `viewCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `blog_posts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `blog_posts_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);

-- Content queue (social posts, ads)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `content_queue` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `platform` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `contentType` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `content` text,
  `imageUrl` text,
  `hashtags` json,
  `status` enum('pending','scheduled','posted','failed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `scheduledAt` timestamp,
  `postedAt` timestamp,
  `metadata` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `content_queue_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

-- Referral codes (new system)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `referral_codes` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
  `totalReferrals` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalRewardsEarned` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalCommissionCents` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `referral_codes_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `referral_codes_code_unique` UNIQUE(`code`)
);

-- Referral conversions
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `referral_conversions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `referralCodeId` int NOT NULL,
  `referrerId` int NOT NULL,
  `referredUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('signed_up','subscribed','rewarded') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'signed_up',
  `rewardType` enum('free_month','commission','credit','tier_upgrade','discount','high_value_discount') DEFAULT 'discount',
  `rewardAmountCents` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `rewardGrantedAt` timestamp,
  `subscriptionId` varchar(256),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `referral_conversions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

-- Subscriptions table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `stripeCustomerId` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `stripeSubscriptionId` varchar(128),
  `plan` enum('free','pro','studio','enterprise') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free',
  `status` enum('active','canceled','past_due','incomplete','trialing') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `currentPeriodEnd` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `subscriptions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

-- Notification preferences
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `notification_preferences` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `emailMarketing` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `emailBookings` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `emailReferrals` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `pushEnabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `notification_preferences_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `notification_preferences_userId_unique` UNIQUE(`userId`)
);

-- Add new columns to users if they don't exist
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `passwordHash` varchar(255);
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `emailVerified` boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `refCode` varchar(32);
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `stripeCustomerId` varchar(128);
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionPlan` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'free';
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionStatus` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'active';
ALTER TABLE `users` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptionPeriodEnd` timestamp;

-- Add videoUrl to tattoo_generations if not exists
ALTER TABLE `tattoo_generations` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `videoUrl` text;
